series_metadata.series_description: File contains information for use in legal proceedings. It includes evidence submission forms, disposition form, lab reports, and any other pertinent information.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area four calendar years ; Microform: microfilm diazo copy in operating area permanently and master microfilm in off site storage permanently. ; Electronic: machine readable format in operating area permanently. backup copy in off-site storage permanently. LIMS record on LIMS server permanently
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent
